## Which package(s)?

## Checklist

- [ ] I added a changeset (`npx changeset`) describing the change — **required for any user-facing change**
- [ ] Tests added/updated and `npm test` passes
- [ ] Docs updated (package `README.md` and/or root `README.md`)
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`feat(pi-files): ...`, `fix: ...`)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or personal paths committed
